SERVICE COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, JAMIE SAN FRANCISCO REAL PROPERTY HOLDINGS 9, LLC WIRUM, ANDREA A. TRUSTEE IN BANKRUPTCY FOR THE ESTATE OF RESMARS ENTERPRISES LLC $6,577.83 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,577.83, PLAINTIFF HAS JUDGMENT AGAINST ALL PARTIES AND AGAINST THE SURPLUS PROCEEDS. THE FOLLOWING PARTIES SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM THE SURPLUS PROCEEDS: CCSF, CA. FRANCHISE TAX BOARD, RICHARD RESMA, CYNTHIA RESMA, RICHARD DERUS, MARIA DERUS, JAMIE LEE.
